holdings.title: Holdings
holdings.start_building_portfolio: Start building your portfolio by adding your first investment position.
holdings.detailed_overview: Detailed overview of your current positions.
holdings.error_fetching_holdings: There was an error fetching your holdings. Please try again.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.taxable_portfolio_description: Manage holdings and track performance for your taxable portfolio
portfolio.total_market_value_description: Total market value of all holdings
portfolio.create_first_portfolio: Create your first portfolio to start tracking investments
portfolio.portfolio_not_found_description: The portfolio you are looking for does not exist or you do not have permission to view it.
portfolio.delete_portfolio_description: This will move "{{name}}" and all its transaction history to the Recycle Bin. You can restore it later if needed.
portfolio.upload_portfolio_statement: Upload a portfolio statement with transaction history to see transactions here
portfolio.track_wealth_performance: Track your wealth and performance across all investment accounts
portfolio.expand_portfolio_description: Start tracking a new investment strategy or financial account.
portfolio.advanced_analysis_description: View detailed performance charts, allocation, and risk metrics.
portfolio.tax_efficiency_description: Generate realized gain/loss reports and dividend summaries for tax prep.

file_upload.upload_description: Upload PDF or CSV files to automatically extract holdings and transaction history.
file_upload.processing_note: Files will be processed in the background. You can track the status below.
file_upload.drag_and_drop_description: Drag and drop files here, or browse
file_upload.track_status_description: Track the status of your holdings file imports
file_upload.files_uploaded_successfully: {{count}} file(s) uploaded successfully. Processing will begin shortly.
file_upload.please_select_at_least_one_file: Please select at least one file

archive.title: Archive Portfolio
archive.archive_confirmation: Are you sure you want to archive this portfolio?
archive.archive_description: Archiving will hide this portfolio from the main view but preserve all data. You can restore it later.

errors.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.validation_future_date: Transaction date cannot be in the future
errors.validation_invalid_file_format: Invalid file format. Please upload a valid {{format}} file
errors.validation_portfolio_has_holdings: Cannot delete portfolio with active holdings
errors.validation_invalid_quantity: Quantity must be a positive number
errors.validation_invalid_price: Price must be a positive number
errors.validation_portfolio_name_length: Portfolio name must be between 1 and 100 characters
errors.validation_symbol_length: Security symbol must be between 1 and 20 characters
errors.validation_invalid_amount: Total amount must be a valid number
errors.duplicate_portfolio_name: A portfolio with this name already exists
errors.internal_error: An internal error occurred. Please try again later

tax_export.title: Tax Data Export
tax_export.description: Consolidate your investment transactions and calculate capital gains for tax preparation.
tax_export.disclaimer_text: These reports are provided for informational purposes only and do not constitute professional tax advice. Always consult with a qualified tax professional before filing.
tax_export.download_your_tax_reports: Download your tax reports in various formats for your software or accountant.
tax_export.detailed_transaction_report: Detailed transaction-level report compatible with Excel and Google Sheets.
tax_export.machine_readable_format: Machine-readable format for importing into custom financial software.
tax_export.official_tax_documents_text: YourFinanceWORKS provides tracking and calculation based on your provided data. It does NOT issue official 1099-B or 1099-DIV forms. You should use the official forms from your brokerage/custodian for your actual tax filing.
tax_export.export_successful: Export successful! Check your downloads folder.

performance.title: Performance
performance.deep_dive_description: Deep dive into your portfolio performance, cost basis, and gain metrics.
performance.performance_calculated_using_fifo: Performance is calculated using the First-In, First-Out (FIFO) cost basis method. This follows standard accounting practices for realized and unrealized gains.

rebalancing.title: Rebalancing
rebalancing.trades_needed: Trades needed to align with target allocation
rebalancing.note_text: These are suggested buy/sell amounts for each asset class. You should decide which specific securities within these classes to trade based on your investment strategy.
rebalancing.current_allocation_within_1_percent: Current allocation is within 1% of your targets. No actions needed.
rebalancing.set_and_save_targets: Set and save your target allocations on the left to see drift analysis and trade recommendations.
rebalancing.total_must_equal_100: Total must equal exactly 100% for rebalancing analysis to work correctly.

create_portfolio.title: Create New Portfolio
create_portfolio.description: Create a new investment portfolio to track your assets, transactions, and performance.
create_portfolio.enter_basic_information: Enter the basic information for your new investment account.
create_portfolio.descriptive_name: A descriptive name to identify this portfolio.
create_portfolio.affects_tax_reporting: Affects tax reporting and performance benchmarks.
create_portfolio.use_specific_names: Use specific names like "Fidelity ROTH IRA" for better organization.
create_portfolio.portfolios_can_be_archived: Portfolios can be archived later if you close the account.
create_portfolio.multi_currency_support: Multi-currency support allows tracking international investments.
create_portfolio.separating_investments: Separating your investments allows for more accurate tax reporting and helps you track specific financial goals independently.
